UNITED NATIONS - ORGANISATION DES NATIONS UNIES

No. 22685

CERTIFICATE OF REGISTRATION

The SECRETARY-GENERAL of the UNITED NATIONS hereby certifies that the following international agreement registered with the Secretariat, in accordance with

Article 102 of the Charter of the United Nations:

CERTIFICAT

d'ENREGISTREMENT
